ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the data was collected */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of data (e.g., financial transactions, economic indicators) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the data (e.g., financial, economic) */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file_id" INTEGER /* File path to the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the observation belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable being observed */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the observation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or research team */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_description" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_description_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
